texto: I don't want to fool with it but what choice have I got? They don't give you any choice now. I can let it go
autor: but what will the next thing be? I didn't ask for any of this and if you've got to do it you've got to do it.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de but what will the next thing be? I didn't ask for any of this and if you've got to do it you've got to do it. que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “I don't want to fool with it but what choice have I got? They don't give you any choice now. I ca…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, ernest-hemingway, to-have-and-have-not, com foco em to-have-and-have-not.
